query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_llms.saved_memories (
                id,
                tenant_id,
                user_id,
                clause,
                clause_hash,
                raw_facts,
                status,
                source,
                created_at,
                updated_at
            )
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                clause = VALUES(clause),
                clause_hash = VALUES(clause_hash),
                raw_facts = VALUES(raw_facts),
                status = VALUES(status),
                source = VALUES(source),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
